backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining data types (VideoClip, UserProfile, FeedbackSubmission, etc.) and implementing features including clip management, user profiles, OAuth credentials, feedback submissions, and clip similarity scoring.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding feedbackSubmissions array and currentSubmissionId fields to the existing state containing videoClips, userProfiles, and adminPrincipals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three feedback-related features (modal UI, React Query hooks, and admin panel section) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behavior of each component, hook, and configuration file.
frontend/.env: Environment file containing the Google OAuth client ID used for YouTube authentication in the frontend.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with a detailed step-by-step guide for obtaining and configuring a Google OAuth client ID, including troubleshooting tips.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard gitignore for a Vite/Node frontend project, excluding node_modules, dist, editor files, and environment variable files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities and a full set of OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Beast Clipping frontend, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application entry point that sets up routing, React Query, and renders the home page with video clipping workflow (URL input, YouTube player, clip controls, AI suggestions) and profile setup flow.
Debug panel component for admins that displays authentication info, admin principals, hashmap size, and initialization status with copy-to-clipboard and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and displays error message, stack trace, and component stack with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Displays a list of current admin users with their principal IDs and short user IDs, with loading skeleton and error states.
Admin management form that allows adding new admins by principal ID, composing the add-admin mutation with success/error feedback and the AdminList component.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin panel page that aggregates stats, debug info, admin management, user status management, and feedback submissions into collapsible sections with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: React component that displays a card for connecting/disconnecting a Google/YouTube account, showing channel status, avatar, and connect button with tooltip support.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: React component rendering a single video clip as a card with thumbnail, duration, viral score badge, and actions for deleting, downloading, or posting to YouTube.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: React component that fetches and displays a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard, with loading and empty states.
React component that shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clip suggestions, allowing users to select a suggestion to populate clip creation fields.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: React component providing a form to set start/end timestamps and a title for creating a video clip, with support for pre-filling from selected clips or AI suggestions.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: Modal dialog component for submitting user feedback, supporting feature requests or bug reports with title and description fields and validation.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of feedback submissions (bug reports and feature requests) fetched from the backend, with support for deleting entries via a confirmation dialog and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component providing the header with navigation, authentication (Internet Identity login/logout), admin button visibility logic, and a feedback button, wrapping page content.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form component that collects a new user's name and email, then saves their profile to the backend with default role and status values.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the authenticated user's short user ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge for a given UserRole (owner, admin, user, friend) with an appropriate icon and color, supporting multiple size variants.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin panel component that lists all users in a searchable table, allowing admins to change each user's role and account status via dropdowns.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: A form component that accepts a YouTube URL, validates it, loads the video, and optionally triggers AI-powered clip generation via a backend call with mock fallback.
A badge component that displays a viral potential score with color coding and icons based on score thresholds (high/medium/low).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: A simple card component that renders a responsive YouTube iframe embed given a video ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: A mutation hook that calls the backend to add an admin by user ID and invalidates admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: A query hook that fetches admin debug information (principal, admin status) for the current authenticated user, with placeholder fields pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: A query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready.
An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: A hook that fetches total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend using two parallel React Query queries.
A mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions, falling back to hardcoded mock AI suggestions if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: A mutation hook that saves a new video clip to the backend, computing a viral score based on clip duration and title keywords before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: A hook that fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with per-clip loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: A stateful hook managing start/end timestamp inputs (minutes and seconds), with validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: A mutation hook that deletes a feedback submission by ID from the backend and shows a toast notification on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Mutation hook that generates a download URL from the backend and triggers a browser file download for a video clip with a sanitized filename.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: Query hook that fetches all feedback submissions from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: Mutation hook that submits user feedback to the backend and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error instead of throwing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Query hook that checks whether the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with detailed debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook that validates Google OAuth credentials and clip duration, then posts a video clip to YouTube Shorts via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of query and mutation hooks for user profile management, Google OAuth credential storage, and YouTube connection status checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that updates a user's role via the backend actor and invalidates related role queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Mutation hook that updates a user's status via the backend actor and invalidates related user queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: Query hook that fetches all user roles from the backend and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: React hook that manages YouTube channel connection state, providing queries and mutations to connect (via Google OAuth redirect) and disconnect a YouTube channel using the backend actor.
Simple hook exposing utility functions to validate YouTube URLs via regex and extract the 11-character video ID from them.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query, Internet Identity authentication, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: Page component that handles the Google OAuth redirect callback by validating the state parameter, exchanging the authorization code via the backend, and navigating home on success or error.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Exports a single function that deterministically generates an 8-character base-36 user ID from a principal string using a simple hash.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for the YouTube OAuth flow that provides structured logging, response validation, and common error pattern matching with suggestions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining content paths, OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, Inter font, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3 for 'Beast Clipping', listing three existing frontend features (feedback modal, React query hooks, admin panel section) and two pending backend feature requests (FeedbackSubmission data type/API and the overall feedback form AR-1).
